scope: CLI options, RPC option mutation, help, manual, completion
files: src/OptionHandlerFactory.cc; src/prefs.cc; src/prefs.h; src/usage_text.h; docs/manual/en/aria2-next.rst; docs/completion/aria2-next; tests
acceptance: The dns-resolver option and async/system values are absent from active code and public docs.
evidence: Active stale scan found no dns-resolver, PREF_DNS_RESOLVER, V_ASYNC, or V_SYSTEM outside historical maintenance records.

acceptance: CurlDownloadCommand no longer pre-resolves hosts, injects CURLOPT_RESOLVE, disables libcurl redirects, or owns c-ares selection.

scope: CI, release workflow, Docker, dependency baseline, smoke tests
acceptance: Release automation no longer fetches, builds, links, or expects c-ares. Release smoke rejects Async DNS and c-ares feature output.
evidence: Maintained shell syntax checks, workflow YAML parsing, active stale scan, and local release-smoke passed.

acceptance: Async DNS is removed from enabledFeatures and c-ares is removed from library reporting.
evidence: `build/default/aria2-next --version` reported no Async DNS or c-ares entry, and CTest passed.
